'''Greg Fleming''' (born 29 January 1973 in [[Newcastle, New South Wales]]) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. His position of choice was as a {{rlp|fb}} or {{rlp|ce}}.

He played for [[WA Reds#Perth Reds (1997)|Perth Reds]] and [[Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs]] in the [[NRL]]. In the [[Super League]] he played for [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]].
